name: LCS and Partners
message: Worthy a Bootstrap-based, Responsive HTML5 Template LCS & Partners ("LCS") is an elite corporate law firm based in Taipei. Since the firm was founded in 1998, it has grown rapidly to approximately 50 legal professionals and gained a reputation as one of the top corporate law firms in Taiwan that regularly handles major and complex cases for top-tier domestic and international clients.www.lcs.com.tw
